jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Evok
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!
